sglang.title: [FIX] Flux2-Klein prompt tokenization length to 512 and add regression coverage
sglang.author: adityavaid
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Issue : #21372
closes #21372
Flux2-Klein uses a Qwen3/Mistral-style text encoder path where 77  is incorrect and truncates long prompts.
The old behavior came from inherited text_encoder_extra_args from Flux1.
This change fixes the root cause and adds a defensive guard in Klein tokenizati

load either a full diffusers-style overlay repo or

sglang.title: [Whisper] Enable CUDA graph support and timestamp for whisper model
sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Previously, Whisper used a custom bmm + mask cross-attention implementation with a Python-side _encoder_cache dict, which was incompatible with CUDA graph capture/replay. This PR enables CUDA graph for Whisper, achieving 36% throughput improvement with identical accuracy.
Related: #21161

sglang.author: wenscarl
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
To accelerating long context inference with skip-softmax attention. The work is originally proposed and implemented in TRTLLM. This PR enables the corresponding attention kernels and depends on flashinfer-python==0.6.4.

sglang.title: fix: piecewise_cuda_graph get correct qo_indptr
sglang.author: yyihuang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
#21218
Modifications
for padding tokens, append a fake bs+1-th request with pad_tokens extend tokens whose KV indices all point to scratch slot 0. This makes qo_indptr[-1] = static_num_tokens, without affecting causal masks for real requests.
Accuracy Tests
python -m sglang.launch_server

Fix image dataset compatibility with the sglang native backend by using chat-template-applied prompts (with image placeholder tokens) instead  of raw text, and restrict image dataset to verified backends (sglang, sglang-native, sglang-oai-chat).

sglang.title: [AMD] Add peft>=0.18.0 to diffusion_hip deps for transformers 5.x compat for AMD diffusion model
sglang.author: yichiche
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Solve dependency issue introduced in latest sglang upgrade, which cause wan2.2 fail to launch.
The ROCm Docker image ships transformers==5.3.0, but peft==0.17.0 (pulled in by diffusers) tries to import HybridCache from transformers, which was removed in v5.x. This causes an ImportError at

sglang.title: [GDN] Fuse GDN kkt + solve_tril into one kernel
sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Learning from FLA, this PR is to fuse GDN kkt + solve_tril into one kernel so as to release the register burden and improve performance. Per benchmark, accuracy is expected, kernel performance uplift 5%.
The same approach can be adapted to KDA kernel, will follow up in the following PR.

vllm.author: yzong-rh
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix flaky test test_abort_during_final_step[False] (#38221).
The async_scheduling=False variant fails intermittently with:
AssertionError: Expected at least 1 captured finish status, got 0.
File content: ['INIT:WORKER', 'INIT:SCHEDULER']

The root cause seems to be a race condition: in sync

The flashinfer-cubin package ships headers at

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Disallow renderer_num_workers > 1 with mm processor cache
vllm.author: scyyh11
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix a bug where --renderer-num-workers > 1 causes race conditions on the multimodal processor cache, leading to crashes or data corruption.
Neither the LRU nor SHM multimodal processor cache is thread-safe. The renderer's ThreadPoolExecutor dispatches multimodal preprocessing to multiple thr

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Fix UV install in Dockerfile.rocm to detect curl failures and retry

vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix silent UV installation failure in Dockerfile.rocm that causes uv: not found in the build_rixl stage. The curl ... | sh pipe masks curl failures. When curl times out, sh reads empty stdin and exits 0, so Docker reports the step as successful Download to a file first so curl failure is caught, add

vllm.title: [BugFix][Frontend] apply task instruction as system prompt in cohere v2/embed
vllm.author: walterbm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Followup to #37074 with some bug fixes for the /v2/embed Cohere API to ensure task instructions are used in the system prompt when a chat template is present. If there is no chat template the processor falls back to the old behavior of prepending the task instructions to the input text
Also

vllm.title: [Feature] Add Qwen3-ForcedAligner support via token classification pooling
vllm.author: haosdent
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Support Qwen3-ForcedAligner-0.6B in vLLM (fixes #35310).
The Forced Aligner uses the same HF architecture as Qwen3-ASR but performs per-token classification (not generation) to produce word-level timestamps from audio + reference text. This PR adds it as a pooling model using the existing to

vllm.title: [Spec Decode, BugFix] Propagate norm_before_fc from Eagle3 speculator
vllm.author: shubhra
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The norm_before_fc field in Eagle3 speculator config.json was not being propagated through update_eagle3() in algos.py, causing llama_eagle3.py to always see norm_before_fc=False.
Checkpoints trained with norm_before_fc: true (e.g. gpt-oss speculators) silently skipped the RMSNorm before the fc proj

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Fix cross-attention dispatch for encoder-decoder models
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Cross-attention layers in encoder-decoder models (Whisper, BART, etc.) produce incorrect beam search results on ROCM_ATTN and ROCM_AITER_FA. This PR removes ENCODER_DECODER from their supports_attn_type so the backend
dispatch selects a working backend for cross-attention layers instead.
Motivation
